businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest publicly-traded Ethereum holder, applying MicroStrategy's Bitcoin playbook to Ethereum
businessSummary.description: Originally a Bitcoin miner, pivoted to Ethereum treasury strategy after Tom Lee (Fundstrat co-founder) joined. Holds ~4% of total ETH supply with $10.7B in total crypto + cash. MAVAN staking platform launched generating $177M annualized staking revenue. Surged +8.09% today on S&P +2.91% rally and ETH +3.14% recovery.
howTheyMakeMoney: ETH Staking: 3,142,643 ETH staked, $177M annualized revenue
Dividend: 5.0% yield, only dividend-paying crypto treasury company

overallOpinion: Surged +8.09% today on crypto recovery and S&P +2.91% mega rally. ETH +3.14% to $2,087. Volume 70.1M (+54% above 3-mo avg), strongest in crypto sector beating MARA +4.68% and RIOT +4.48%
NAV 15% discount, 5.0% dividend, B. Riley $33 (+67%), Yahoo Finance 'best oversold stock'. MAVAN staking generating $177M annually. Cash $961M for more ETH purchases

$19.78, below 50-day ($23) and 200-day ($37). YTD -27% but 172% since IPO. Today's bounce could mark trend reversal. Buy maintained with dollar-cost averaging, contingent on ETH holding $2,000 support

investmentVerdict.summary: +8.09% surge with +54% volume signals sentiment shift. NAV 15% discount, 5.0% dividend, B. Riley $33 (+67%). Crypto recovery (ETH +3.14%) and macro stabilization align. Buy with dollar-cost averaging, ETH $2,000 support as prerequisite
